ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines for data and AI applications, including automated testing, security scanning, and automated deployment strategies.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: This skill KSA describes execution-level work in Technical Foundations that is not expected of a Director of Data Products (director tier). The role is responsible for overseeing and directing this work, not performing it directly. Excluded on execution-seniority grounds.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this execution-level skill KSA be expected of a Director of Data Products in real-world practice?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Compensation benchmarks and leadership effectiveness research confirm that director-tier roles direct and oversee execution work in Technical Foundations rather than performing it. Role scope analysis supports exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: execution-level skill KSA in Technical Foundations is appropriately excluded for a non-execution director role. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Execution-level skill KSA in Technical Foundations is outside the expected competency scope for a Director of Data Products (director tier). The role oversees this work; it does not perform it directly.
